name: Foreign Tax Credit for Nonresident Aliens and Foreign Corporations

eligibility.description: Must be a nonresident alien or foreign corporation engaged in a trade or business within the U.S. with effectively connected income (ECI) subject to foreign tax.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows nonresident aliens and foreign corporations to claim a credit for foreign taxes paid on income effectively connected with a U.S. trade or business.
